---
name: 🏆 New Challenge Suggestion
about: Propose a new Excel Quest challenge
title: "[New Challenge] "
labels: new-challenge
assignees: ''
---

## Challenge Name
<!-- A short, descriptive, game-flavored name (e.g., "VLOOKUP Treasure Hunt") -->

## Proposed Category
<!-- Choose one or suggest a new one: Formulas / Data Cleaning / Pivot Tables / Automation / Data Analysis / Advanced -->

## Difficulty
<!-- Choose one: Apprentice / Journeyman / Master -->

## Challenge Scenario / Story
<!-- A short, game-flavored narrative that sets the scene for the challenge (2–5 sentences) -->

## Skills It Teaches
<!-- List the Excel skills this challenge covers (e.g., VLOOKUP, IFERROR, exact match) -->

## Your Mission (Objectives)
<!-- List the specific tasks the user must complete to "win" the challenge -->

## Files Needed
<!-- Describe any starter data or files the user would need. Remember: .xlsx files won't be committed — they can be generated in the solution notebook. -->

## Additional Notes
<!-- Any other context, links, or references that would help reviewers understand the challenge -->
